metadata.title: Now Thank We All Our God
metadata.subtitle: Martin Rinkart (c. 1636) — English tr. Catherine Winkworth (1858)
metadata.composer: Johann Crüger (1598–1662), tune "Nun danket alle Gott" (1647)
metadata.lyricist: Martin Rinkart (1586–1649); English translation by Catherine Winkworth (1827–1878)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Rinkart (d. 1649), Crüger (d. 1662), and Winkworth (d. 1878) all died > 140 years ago
